source_first_basis: PyMuPDF documents OCR through Page.get_textpage_ocr and a tessdata folder.
The fixture is synthetic and image-only so digital text extraction does not silently satisfy OCR claims.
The committed fixture supports an opt-in owner-runtime OCR smoke without committing tessdata.

fixtures.license_note: Synthetic in-repository fixture generated for NoiseProof OCR smoke tests.

boundary_notes: not OCR evidence until owner-runtime smoke succeeds
